description: The US Agency for Global Media (USAGM) is an independent agency of the United States federal government that funds and oversees US international broadcasting. It is the parent body of [Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty](/orgs/radio-free-europe-radio-liberty), the Voice of America (parent of [VOA Persian](/orgs/voa-persian)), and several other international outlets. USAGM's mandate is to promote democracy and freedom of the press globally through publicly funded journalism. Its Iran-focused services — VOA Persian and [Radio Farda](/orgs/radio-farda) — are major sources of Persian-language news for audiences inside Iran.
editorial_notes: US federal agency. Parent of RFE/RL and VOA. Formerly Broadcasting Board of Governors (BBG) until 2018.
